author: Laszlo
msg:
Hey farmers,
I want to set up my first box online this weekend (Farm Box S8, Wi-Fi, OTG, and SIM).
I would appreciate any recommendations for a good setup.

My plan is as follows: I have a spare laptop to set everything up. My phone SIM contract is multi-SIM capable (150 GB, staking up to 300 GB, 5G, 500 Mbit/s), so I want to buy a SIM router and use my eSIM on my phone while putting the physical SIM into the router. 

Do you have any recommendations for routers? What works best for you: 5G, LTE, or 4G? Is it recommended to connect the router and the box with a LAN cable?

Is there anything else I forgot? 

Thanks in advance for your help!
